title: nenax hirta subsp. hirta
intro: Nenax hirta subsp. hirta, also known as the hairy nenax or hairy Nenax, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant contains compounds with antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. Nenax hirta subsp. hirta is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
